name: PokéAPI
description: PokéAPI is a full RESTful API for all Pokémon data. No authentication required. Access information on all 1,000+ Pokémon species, moves, abilities, types, and game data going back to Generation I.
longDescription: PokéAPI (the Pokémon API) is a consumption-only API — it only serves data, no user authentication, no writing. It's completely free, open source, and community-maintained. The API provides data for every Pokémon game ever released, including species, Pokédex entries, evolution chains, move sets, held items, and high-quality sprite data.
pricing: Completely free, no rate limits (fair use)
affiliateText: Building a Pokédex app? Deploy it for free on Vercel in under 2 minutes.
